{"type":"tool_use","id":"tool_GvMoLzlOQ56VJjDFNcdVFm0v","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/Users/xin/auto-skills/.claude/worktrees/worker-task-9/domain-tool-core/scripts/mindkeeper-hook.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash
#
# MindKeeper Hook Script
# Called by MindKeeper MCP on session start to auto-update project index
#
# Usage: ./mindkeeper-hook.sh [path]
#   path: Optional starting path for git root detection (defaults to current directory)
#

set -e

# Colors for output (to stderr)
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

# Log to stderr for debugging
log_info() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[mindkeeper-hook]${NC} $1" >&2
}

log_warn() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[mindkeeper-hook]${NC} $1" >&2
}

log_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[mindkeeper-hook]${NC} $1" >&2
}

# Get the directory where this script is located
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"

# Get the project root (parent of scripts directory)
PROJECT_ROOT="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"

# Starting path for git root detection
START_PATH="${1:-$(pwd)}"

log_info "MindKeeper hook triggered"
log_info "Script director...
